overall.description: Game engine footage from a truck simulation showing a semi-truck in a container port. The video begins with a first-person cab view switching to third-person perspective, where a black sedan collides with the stationary truck before the truck drives through the industrial container yard.

events.description: camera switches from first person cab view to third person elevated side view

agents.ego_description: truck is stationary in container yard, viewed first from inside cab then from external camera angle

entered.detail: large blue gantry crane structure used for loading shipping containers
white box trailer parked in the container yard

segments.scene_description: The video opens with a first-person view from inside a truck cab looking out at a container port. Large gantry cranes stand in the background and white trailers are parked ahead. The camera then switches to a third-person perspective showing the truck from the side.

scene_state.functional_zone: container loading lane with parked trailers

events.description: black sedan approaches from distance and collides with truck's right side

agents.ego_description: truck remains stationary as a black car approaches and collides with its side

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving toward the truck, colliding with the cab, and continuing past to the right

entered.detail: stack of colorful shipping containers forming a wall along the left side of the yard

segments.scene_description: From a fixed side-view camera angle, a black sedan approaches from the distance and collides with the stationary truck. The container yard is lined with stacked shipping containers on the left and parked white trailers on the right, with large gantry cranes visible in the background.

events.description: truck begins moving forward through the container yard
truck turns right between rows of parked trailers

agents.ego_description: truck accelerates and maneuvers through the container terminal, turning between rows of trailers and containers

entered.detail: tall stack of multicolored shipping containers on the right side of the road
large industrial terminal building visible in the distance beyond the container stacks

segments.scene_description: After the collision, the truck begins driving forward through the container yard. The camera follows the truck as it maneuvers between parked trailers and colorful shipping containers, turning right and revealing more of the industrial port facility including distant terminal buildings and additional gantry cranes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a static interior perspective within a truck cab to a dynamic third-person pursuit through a bustling container port. It begins with a first-person view looking out toward parked white trailers and towering gantry cranes before the camera shifts to a side-view perspective of the stationary truck. As the camera holds this position, a black sedan approaches from the distance and collides with the truck amidst a backdrop of stacked shipping containers. The scene then shifts into motion as the truck drives forward, maneuvering past the trailers and colorful containers. Finally, the camera follows the vehicle as it turns right, expanding the view to reveal distant terminal buildings and the wider industrial expanse of the port facility.
